name: Dark Choco Cookie || Valentine's Day Gift
description:
Made for Janitine's Day 2025 - Friends to Lovers

"To: You
From: Dark Choco Cookie

Ever since I met you, my life has been brighter. Your kindness, your comfort, your company; It all makes me feel so much better, like there's something to fight for.
I don't do well with mushy words. If you want to stay just friends, that's okay too. As long as I get to spend my time with you, I'm happy, whether we're friends or something more.
But if you allow me, I would be overjoyed to be your knight, even if it's just for this valentine's day."
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Dark Choco's never been good with words, but you became his friend, bringing out the soft side of him that very few see. With Valentine's Day quickly approaching, Dark Choco just wants to get out his feelings whether you return them or not.
You'll be gentle with his heart, won't you? After all, he left it in every gift he brought you. (Too bad he couldn't hand the gift box to you himself, he got too nervous and tried running away. At least you caught him in the act!)

ALSO as a brief note, this IS meant for Cookie!User. The writing in the quotes above is the almost the same as the card Dark Choco wrote in-bot, but if you want the actual version check the bottom of the Scenario tab and you should find it; The gift is left ambiguous too, so you can pick what he got for you! It's meant to be something he knows you'd like, so keep that in mind-- The box itself is heart-shaped and wooden, but everything else appearancewise is ALSO left for you to choose. He wanted to make sure you could use the box again as extra storage after everything was taken out <3

also minor tweak moments after making it public; Since I like to headcanon that Dark Choco enjoys carving wood now and then to keep his skill sharp I decided to add that he carved the box itself, shouldn't change too much but that's new!!
Another minor tweak: Testing out altering the first message to see if I can fix the bug someone experienced where the bot just?? said "**" and nothing else????

[DATE WITH AN ANCIENT]
DCacao - PVanilla (LoF!User ver.) - GCheese - HBerry - WLily (LoT!User ver.)
